advanced-filter-description: Ajọ to ti ni ilọsiwaju ngbanilaaye lati kọ okun kan ti o ni awọn oniṣẹ atẹle: == != <= >= && || () A lo aaye kan bi oluyapa laarin Awọn oniṣẹ. O le ṣe àlẹmọ fun gbogbo Awọn aaye Aṣa nipa titẹ awọn orukọ ati iye wọn. Fun apẹẹrẹ: Field1 == Iye1. Akiyesi: Ti awọn aaye tabi awọn iye ba ni awọn aaye ninu, o nilo lati fi wọn kun sinu awọn agbasọ ẹyọkan. Fun apẹẹrẹ: 'Field 1' == 'Iye 1'. Fun awọn ami iṣakoso ẹyọkan (' \/) lati fo, o le lo \. Fun apẹẹrẹ: Field1 == Emi. Bakannaa o le darapọ awọn ipo pupọ. Fun apẹẹrẹ: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ni deede gbogbo awọn oniṣẹ ni a tumọ lati osi si otun. O le yi aṣẹ pada nipa gbigbe awọn biraketi. Fun apẹẹrẹ: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Bakannaa o le wa awọn aaye ọrọ nipa lilo regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
header-logo-title: Pada si oju-iwe awọn igbimọ rẹ.
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Paste a Kanboard export JSON: an object with "columns" (or tasks carrying column_name) and a "tasks" array (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns become lists and tasks become cards.
import-board-instruction-deck: Paste a NextCloud Deck board JSON (a board with "stacks", each stack carrying its "cards"). Stacks become lists and cards become cards.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Paste an OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses become lists and work packages become cards.
import-board-instruction-issues: Paste a __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues become cards grouped into Open / Closed lists.
import-board-instruction-asana: Paste an Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } from the Asana export or GET /tasks). Tasks are grouped into sections (memberships); completed tasks go to Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Paste a ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages become lists and items become cards.
import-board-instruction-trello: Ninu igbimọ Trello rẹ, lọ si 'Akojọ aṣyn', lẹhinna 'Die sii', 'Tẹjade ati Si ilẹ okeere', 'Jade okeere', ki o daakọ ọrọ ti o yọrisi.
import-board-instruction-csv: Lẹẹmọ sinu Awọn iye Iyasọtọ Koma (CSV)/ Awọn iye Iyasọtọ Taabu (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Paste the JSON from the Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), or an equivalent { "issues": [...] } object. Jira statuses become lists and issues become cards. Optionally include an "automationRules" array to import rules.
import-board-instruction-excel: Choose a WeKan-style .xlsx spreadsheet (the same columns as the Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, dates, custom fields). The first row is the header.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Ninu igbimọ rẹ, lọ si 'Akojọ aṣyn', lẹhinna 'Igbimọ okeere', ki o daakọ ọrọ naa sinu faili ti a gbasile.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Ti o ba gba awọn aṣiṣe nigba gbigbe wọle ọkọ, ma akowọle si tun ṣiṣẹ, ati awọn ọkọ wa ni Gbogbo Boards iwe.

globalSearch-instructions-description: Awọn wiwa le pẹlu awọn oniṣẹ lati tunse wiwa naa.  Awọn oniṣẹ ti wa ni pato nipa kikọ orukọ oniṣẹ ati iye ti o yapa nipasẹ oluṣafihan.  Fun apẹẹrẹ, sipesifikesonu oniṣẹ ti `list:Blocked` yoo fi opin si wiwa si awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu atokọ ti a npè ni *Ti dina*.  Ti iye naa ba ni awọn alafo tabi awọn ohun kikọ pataki o gbọdọ wa ni paamọ ni awọn ami asọye (fun apẹẹrẹ `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-board: `__operator_board__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu awọn igbimọ ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-list: `__operator_list__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ninu awọn akojọ ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-swiml: `__operator_swimlane__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ni awọn odo odo ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-comme: `__operator_comment__:<text>` - ​​awọn kaadi pẹlu ọrọ asọye ti o ni *<text>*.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-label: `__operator_label__:<color>` `__operator_label__:<name>` - awọn kaadi ti o ni aami ibaamu *<color>* tabi *<name>
globalSearch-instructions-operator-user: `__operator_user__:<username>` - ​​awọn kaadi nibiti *<username>* jẹ * ọmọ ẹgbẹ * tabi * apinfunni *
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_creator__:<username>` - ​​awọn kaadi nibiti *<username>* jẹ ẹlẹda kaadi naa
globalSearch-instructions-operator-org: `__operator_org__:<display name|short name>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o jẹ ti igbimọ ti a yàn si agbari *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-team: `__operator_team__:<display name|short name>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o jẹ ti igbimọ ti a yàn si ẹgbẹ *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o wa titi di *<n>* awọn ọjọ lati isisiyi.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ ṣe atokọ gbogbo awọn kaadi ti o ti kọja ọjọ ti o yẹ wọn.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_created__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi eyi ti a ṣẹda *<n>* ọjọ seyin tabi kere si
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi eyi ti a ti títúnṣe *<n>* ọjọ seyin tabi kere si
globalSearch-instructions-status-archive: @ PH0 @ @ - awọn kaadi ti o ti fipamọ
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​gbogbo awọn kaadi ti o wa ni ipamọ ati ti a ko fi pamọ
globalSearch-instructions-status-public: @ PH0 @ @ - awọn kaadi nikan ni gbangba lọọgan
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​nibiti *<field>* jẹ ọkan ninu `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` tabi `__predicate_member__`.  Gbigbe `-` iwaju *<field>* awọn wiwa fun aini iye kan ni aaye yẹn (fun apẹẹrẹ `has:-due` awọn wiwa fun awọn kaadi laisi ọjọ ipari).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​nibiti *<sort-name>* jẹ ọkan ninu `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` tabi `__predicate_modified__`.  Fun iru sokale, gbe `-` siwaju orukọ too naa.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​nibiti *<n>* jẹ odidi rere ti n ṣalaye nọmba awọn kaadi ti yoo han ni oju-iwe kan.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-1: Awọn oniṣẹ lọpọlọpọ le wa ni pato.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Awọn oniṣẹ ti o jọra jẹ * OR * ed papọ.  Awọn kaadi ti o baramu eyikeyi ninu awọn ipo ni yoo da pada.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` yoo da awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu eyikeyi akojọ ti a npè ni *Ti dina mọ* tabi *Wa*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Awọn oniṣẹ iyatọ jẹ * AND * ed papọ.  Awọn kaadi nikan ti o baamu gbogbo awọn oniṣẹ ti o yatọ ni a pada.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` awọn kaadi nikan pada wa ninu atokọ * Wa * pẹlu aami * pupa * kan.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Awọn ọjọ le jẹ asọye bi odidi rere tabi odi odi tabi lilo `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` tabi `__predicate_year__` fun asiko lọwọlọwọ.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Nipa aiyipada awọn kaadi pamosi ko wa.

gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create to make one).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Path on the WeKan server to the downloaded service account JSON key file (created below). Use this OR paste the JSON into the field below.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → your service account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (downloads the file). Paste its contents here, or save the file and set its path above.
